# Sauraj Kumar Singh

> DevOps Engineer and open source contributor based in Noida, India. Builds and
> automates scalable, secure infrastructure with Docker, Kubernetes, Terraform,
> AWS, and Azure, with a focus on CI/CD, observability, and reliability.

## About

Sauraj Kumar Singh is a DevOps Engineer who designs self-healing clusters,
reliable deployment pipelines, and observability stacks that detect issues before
users do. He is an active open source contributor and a former Android ROM
maintainer (CipherOS, PixelPlusUI). Currently pursuing a B.Tech in Information
Technology (AKTU, 2023–2027).

## Expertise

- DevOps & Automation: Docker, Kubernetes, Helm, GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, Ansible, Terraform, CI/CD, Infrastructure as Code
- Cloud & Platforms: AWS, Azure, GCP, Oracle Cloud, Linode
- Observability & Monitoring: Prometheus, Grafana, Loki, Node Exporter, alerting
- Security & DevSecOps: HashiCorp Vault, container security, secret management, vulnerability scanning
- Languages: Go, Python, Bash, C, JavaScript, SQL, YAML
- Linux & Systems: Linux, systemd, shell scripting, server administration

For collaboration, open source, or DevOps/SRE opportunities, reach out via email
at ksauraj1@gmail.com or through any of the links above.
